final_recommendation.justification: AssistPro is recommended because it achieved the strongest overall compliance profile after weighting mandatory requirements more heavily. It has a weighted score of 24.0, with 2 mandatory requirements fully met, 1 partially met, 0 mandatory failures, and 2 unresolved mandatory requirements.
tradeoffs: AssistPro: All Requirements(meets=13, partial=11, failed=0, unknown=19), Mandatory Requirements(meets=2, partial=1, failed=0, unknown=2)
DeskGenie: All Requirements(meets=6, partial=18, failed=4, unknown=15), Mandatory Requirements(meets=1, partial=1, failed=1, unknown=2)
